core_payload.content:
# DeepMine Project

## 1. Role
DeepMine Project will become the fuller quarry program of N1Hub, pushing mining beyond the first industrial layer toward richer provider diversity, stronger context assembly, smarter ore manifests, and better economic routing.

## 2. Future Project Contract
The project will unify API, subscription, and hosted inference lanes under one governed quarry; assemble context packs intentionally; preserve clearer ore manifests and extraction boundaries; and route mining work by assignment class, background posture, and budget state.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Quarry output will become easier for A2C, Workspace, and N-Infinity to consume because the mining program will deliver cleaner ore, better economics, and more explicit handoff expectations.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine Project supports To Dig Deep by making extraction a governed program rather than a bag of provider calls.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine Project defines the future quarry program of N1Hub: richer provider diversity, stronger context-pack assembly, smarter ore-manifest generation, assignment-aware routing, and more deliberate night-shift economics for heavy intelligence workloads.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
